core_mechanism: implicit (adjoint-method) differentiation: computing forward and backward parameter sensitivities of the fixed point / solution of a large coupled system by solving a sparse linear system derived from the implicit-function theorem, instead of differentiating an iterative solver step-by-step
brief_reason: The abstract's method is a sparse linear solver that computes the forward and backward derivatives of the tensor network with respect to its defining parameters 'in an implicit way,' providing a stable differentiation primitive that circumvents the instabilities of unrolled automatic differentiation.
